property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Lower opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. Lower opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. Lower opponent's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. Costs 3 stages to use. Lower opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Saiyan Heritage only. Energy attack. Playing this card stops a single named opponent from making an energy attack on his next combat phase. Lower opponent's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Saiyan Heritage only. Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Lower your opponent's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Saiyan Heritage only. Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Any one of your personalities gains 5 power stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: Heroes only. Raise your anger 1 level. If your Main Personality is Piccolo or Nail, raise your anger 2 levels instead. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If successful, also draw the top 3 cards from an opponent's discard pile and remove them from the game. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If your Main Personality is a Hero, raise your anger 1 level. If "Dragon Ball 6" is in play, raise your anger 2 levels instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: Heroes only. Energy attack. If performed by Tien, draw a card.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. Stop all physical attacks performed against villains for the remainder of Combat. Lower your opponent's anger 2 levels. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Saiyan Heritage only. Remove an opponent's drill card from the game. Lower opponent's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Choose one, End Combat or Your opponent skips their next combat step on their next turn. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Lower your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. Costs 2 power stage and, if successful, remove the top card from your life deck from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack that costs 1 life card to perform. If successful, end Combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: For every 2 of your life cards that you now remove from the game, you may remove from the game 1 opponent drill of your choice.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack costing X life cards. X must be between 1 – 7. This attack does X life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops all energy attacks for the rest of this combat. Costs 2 life cards to use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Power up your main personality to its highest stage. Raise your anger 1 level. Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops an opponent's energy attack. Lower opponent's anger 1 level. If "Blue Life Defense Drill" is in play lower opponent's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops an opponent's physical attack. Lower opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops all attacks from an opponent in this combat. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If successful, it also does 3 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If successful, it also stops opponent's from making energy attacks for the rest of this combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Saiyan Heritage only. Stops an energy attack and stops all energy attacks for the rest of this combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Saiyan Heritage only. Power up your main personality 5 power stages. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Raise your anger 1 level. Power up 3 stages. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. If this attack is stopped, your opponent discards 2 life cards.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy Attack. If successful, Tien also takes the top 2 discarded cards and places them at the bottom of his life deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical Attack. If successful, Yamcha also takes the top 2 discarded cards and places them at the bottom of his life deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical Attack. If successful, it also does +4 power stages of damage if Goku is present.

property.name: Text
property.value: Bulma may capture a dragon ball from her opponent if she does damage in an energy attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy Attack. If successful, Chiaotzu also stops all other opponent's physical attacks in this combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical Attack. If successful, Yajirobe also does 3 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical Attack. If successful, you also may take the 2 bottom cards from your discard pile into your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy Attack. This attack cannot be stopped by using combat card defenses.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical Attack. This attack cannot be stopped by using combat card defenses.

property.name: Text
property.value: At the end of a combat, put any single ally from your discard pile into play at 4 stages above zero.

property.name: Text
property.value: Play this card as your first card from your hand during Combat. Stops a physical or energy attack. For the remainder of Combat, stops all attacks of the same type this card stopped.

property.name: Text
property.value: All opponent's and their allies lose 3 power stages. Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: All opponent's and allies lose 2 power stages. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Costs 3 power stages to use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Costs 3 power stages to use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops an energy attack. Take two cards from your discard pile and put them at the bottom of your life deck. Limit 1 per deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Reduce the damage from all attacks performed against you by 1 power stage or 1 life card of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. Costs 4 power stages to use. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If successful, it also stops the opponent from playing any other energy attack cards in this combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical or energy attack. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy Attack. If successful, also lower all opponents' anger 1 level. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack costing 1 power stage to use. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack costing 1 power stage to use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Reduce the damage from all attacks performed against you by 1 power stage or 1 life card of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: All energy attacks performed against you, do 1 less life card of damage, to a minimum of 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: Forces opponent's to constantly show the cards in their hands face up on the table.

property.name: Text
property.value: At the beginning of every turn, discard 1 opponent's non-combat/non-dragon ball card in play. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Increases your power up rating by 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: All of your energy attacks performed against a villain do +3 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Once per turn, search your life deck for 1 level-one ally and place it in your hand after every successful physical attack against an opponent you make.

property.name: Text
property.value: All physical attacks performed against you do 2 less power stages of damage, to a minimum of 0. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: All of your energy attacks cost 1 power stage for you to perform (after all modifiers from other cards/effects).

property.name: Text
property.value: Do +2 life cards of damage with each successful energy attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. For every 3 power stages of damage you receive, per attack, your opponent loses 1 power stage of damage. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops the first energy attack made against you in a combat. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Vegeta, Goku, Gohan, Nappa, and Raditz only. Do +1 life card of damage with each successful energy attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Increases your power up rating (PUR) by 3 when Dende is anywhere in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: Raise your anger 1 level when you successfully do a physical and energy attack in the same combat. Once per combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Lower your opponent's anger 1 level after every successful energy attack against your opponent.

property.name: Text
property.value: After making a successful energy attack, remove from the game an opponent's non-combat/non-dragon ball card in play. Limit one per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful, it also stops your opponent from making any more physical attacks in this combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. Also, if successful, no other physical combat cards can be played for the rest of this combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 3 power stages of damage. (Do not consult the Physical Attack Table.)

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 4 power stages of damage. (Do not consult the Physical Attack Table.)

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Costs 3 power stages to use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack costing 1 life card to use. If successful, also discard all of the opponent's drill cards on the tabe.

property.name: Text
property.value: Search your life deck for 1 combat card and put it into your hand. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Heroes only. Raise your anger 2 levels. Take any 2 cards from your discard pile and place them at the bottom of your life deck. Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 6 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy Attack. If successful, it also does 3 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy Attack. If successful, also steal a dragon ball from your opponent.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. After that physical attack, raise Raditz's anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops an energy attack in a combat. Also, discard an opponent's drill card in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical Attack. If successful it does +4 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. If this attack is stopped, your opponent discards 3 life cards.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack, if successful, this card also causes all allies to lose 2 power stages, but no additional life card damage is taken. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Raise your anger 2 levels. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Raise your anger 1 level. Lower your opponent's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: All of your opponents search their discard piles and Life Decks for "Kami Fades" and remove them from the game. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Heroes only. Opponent's can play only 1 dragon ball on their turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Opponent's can play only 1 dragon ball on their turn. Also, if Saibaimen are in play anywhere, heroes must play with their cards face up during combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Heroes only. This card stops the combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. If your opponent's Main Personality is a hero, he discards 4 life cards. Limit 1 per deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Heroes only. Select any 3 discarded cards and place them at the bottom of your life deck. Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops an opponent's physical or energy attack. Remove from the game after use. If "Goku's Mixing Drill" is in play, this card can be used as an energy attack instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: Piccolo only. Select a dragon ball card from your life deck matching Piccolo's current personality level and play it. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack and stops all physical attacks for the remainder of Combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. To end the combat, remove an ally from the game. If "Saiyan Power Drill" is in play, this card instead can be used as an energy attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack and, in the process, causes 1 life card of damage to your opponent.

property.name: Text
property.value: Use when needed. Choose a Drill in play. Krillin's Power Tap creates a floating effect that is a copy of that Drill. This floating effect only works during Attack Phases in the Combat Step of the current turn and lasts until the end of Combat. If "Black Shadow Drill" is in play, place all of your opponent's Allies at the bottom of their owners' Life Decks. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful, this card also stops all energy attacks for the rest of this combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Remove all Earth Dragon Balls in play and in all Life Decks from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Heroes only. Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. This attack cannot be stopped, prevented or reduced by Main Personality powers.

property.name: Text
property.value: Heroes only. Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. This attack cannot be stopped, prevented or reduced by Main Personality powers. If "Piccolo's Flight" is in play, this attack does 7 life cards of damage, instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: Heroes only. Stops the first physical attack in the next combat. Remove from the game after use. If "Chiaotzu's Drill" is in play this card can be used as an energy attack instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: Take your top two dicards and place them at the bottom of your life deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: All opponent's must discard their allies in play. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Heroes only. Stops a physical or energy attack and stops all attacks for the remainder of Combat. Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck. If a "Dragon Ball 7" from any Dragon Ball set is in play, discard this card instead of removing it from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Heroes only. Pick a dragon ball from your life deck and play it. Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops the effect of any non-dragon ball card and remove the card from the game. You may use this at any time.

property.name: Text
property.value: Heroes only. Remove an opponent's Non-Combat/non-Dragon Ball card in play from the game. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful it does no damage, but forces the defender to discard all drill cards in play. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops an energy attack and, in the process causes 3 stages of damage to your opponent.

property.name: Text
property.value: This card stops an opponent from winning until the end of your next turn. Use when needed. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If successful, also remove an opponent's drill of your choice from the game. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: As long as this card is in play, all dragon balls in play or brought into play lose their powers for the rest of the game, even if this card is discarded.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 8 life cards of damage. Lower opponent's anger 3 levels. Limit 1 per deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. Lower opponent's anger 2 levels. Limit 1 per deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. Raise your anger 2 levels. Lower opponent's anger 2 levels. Limit 1 per deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Your opponent may not win a Most Powerful Personality Victory or a Dragon Ball Victory until the end of his second turn, starting now. Limit 1 per deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. It costs 1 life card to use. Reduce opponent's anger to 0. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: For every anger you reduce on your Warrior Sword, reduce all opponents' anger that many as well.

property.name: Text
property.value: All players' anger is set to 3.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops an energy attack. Stop all energy attacks for the remainder of Combat. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Search your discard pile and if an ally is there put it into play.

property.name: Text
property.value: Take the top 3 cards from your discard pile and place them at the bottom of your life deck. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 5 power stages of damage (do not consult the Physical Attack Table.)

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. Raise your anger and power stages by 2.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful, it also does 3 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Select, unseen, a card from your opponent's hand and discard it.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: After performing a successful energy attack doing 6 or more life cards of damage you may capture 2 Dragon Balls instead of 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: All successful physical attacks against Garlic Jr. do 3 less power stages of damage, to a minimum of 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: You take a maximum of 2 life cards of damage from all energy attacks your opponent performs.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 6 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. This attack cannot be stopped.
